summary: Tested 'Send Card' campaign step feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI components verified working correctly. Backend: action_type and card_type fields properly stored in campaigns and passed to pending sends. Frontend: Campaign editor shows Send Message/Send Card toggle, 6-card template picker appears when Send Card is selected, pending send page displays card-specific UI with 'Create & Send Card' button.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: CampaignSequenceStep model correctly defines action_type (default 'message') and card_type fields
PASS: Campaign update endpoint accepts and stores action_type and card_type in sequences
PASS: Scheduler trigger_scheduler correctly creates pending sends with action_type='send_card' and card_type for manual delivery mode
PASS: Frontend SequenceStep interface includes actionType and cardType fields
PASS: Frontend campaign editor has 2-button toggle (Send Message | Send Card) for each step
PASS: 6-card template picker grid shown when Send Card selected (congrats, birthday, anniversary, thankyou, welcome, holiday)
PASS: Frontend pending send page detects isCardTask and shows card-specific UI with Create & Send Card button
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test pending send with action_type='send_card' and card_type='birthday' to verify pending send page UI; cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Send Card campaign feature fully tested. Campaign ID 69a27569d1bc10a69de0c9d6 used for testing. The campaign editor at /campaigns/[id] now supports both Send Message and Send Card step types. When Send Card is selected, a 6-card picker grid replaces the message input. The scheduler correctly creates pending sends with action_type and card_type fields. The pending send page at /campaigns/pending-send/[id] shows card-specific UI including gift icon, card type label, and 'Create & Send Card' button for card tasks.
mocked_api_note: Twilio SMS is MOCKED, Campaign auto-send is MOCKED

backend_model.test: CampaignSequenceStep has action_type and card_type fields

backend_scheduler.test: Scheduler creates pending sends with action_type='send_card' for card steps
backend_scheduler.verification: Manual MongoDB insertion verified pending send page detects isCardTask

frontend_campaign_editor_toggle.test: Send Message / Send Card toggle visible on each step
frontend_campaign_editor_toggle.verification: Playwright found 'Send Message' and 'Send Card' buttons, both clickable

frontend_card_picker.test: 6-card template picker appears when Send Card selected
frontend_card_picker.verification: Playwright found all 6 cards: Congrats, Birthday, Anniversary, Thank You, Welcome, Holiday

frontend_pending_send_card_ui.test: Pending send page shows card-specific UI for card tasks
frontend_pending_send_card_ui.verification: Playwright verified: header='Send a Card', gift icon, 'Birthday Card' label, 'Create & Send Card' button
